meaning: n.<苏格兰>鲱斗(鲜鲱鱼计量单位,合37.5加仑,约为750条)
examples: How can a clam cram in a cran cream can?
Gossip girl's hardly a war buff, but I did cran.
Looking back, Cran remembers the early 50s as "a happy time, but rather dull."
When Cran finally hired her team, she confessed about her control freak tendencies.
"They think people aren't going to do it exactly the way they do it, so they believe they have to take over, " says Cran.
